meta.title: ROBO > SOC | University Robotics Society
meta.description: University of Nottingham Robotics Society: workshops, robotics projects and the UniBots competition, open to every student.

about.heading: Who are we?
paragraphs: [[RoboSoc]] brings curious students together to turn ideas into working robots. Meet builders, find a team and learn at your own pace.
about.imageAlt: RoboSoc members testing a robot together at UniBots

competition.heading: Build. Learn. Compete.
competition.body: Everything needed to compete is included: guided teaching, tools, parts and a team. No application or prior experience required.

points.label: SKILLS_TAUGHT
points.text: Arduino, CAD, coding, electronics and machining.

points.label: KIT_INCLUDED
points.text: Tools, parts and resources for your build.

competition.imageAlt: RoboSoc workshop with students learning robotics together

contact.text: Message us on Discord or Instagram

footer.tagline: Built for students. Open to everyone.
